result.finding: reproduce_demo.py --rec: with the theory/QSPR MONOTONE f_xy (a-priori, NOT fit to the tissue BAFs) the predictive error is log10 RMSE 0.837 vs the saturated W2 fit's 0.029. Straw is off 6-40x (PFBA 45/11, PFBS 33/2.2). The model does NOT a-priori predict the Yamazaki tissue BAFs -- a quantitative confirmation of the REFUTED verdict.
